subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #039 The Human and the Divine Station of the Manifestations
subcodes.first_line: We stated before that the Manifestations of God have three stations: First, the material reality
subcodes.first_line_orig: گفتیم که در مظاهر ظهور سه مقام هست اول حقیقت جسمانیه که تعلق باین جسد
